turns.student: Before the final check, please keep the exact-steps style. It keeps me from clicking around the platform.
I can say it now: webhook retries are not automatic, so Retry failed order sync must be Enabled before launch.
The test order now shows Synced after I reran the failed order sync.
The short checklist helped more than the long explanation while the sale date was close.
I still want one thing at a time, but I am much calmer about going live now.
